description: Emit failure contract conformance cases (ADR-0025). Each SDK test MUST load this file, iterate every case, run it against its own DaemonEmitter (default mode, no listener on the socket), map the emit outcome to an outcome_category, and assert it equals `expect`. The iteration MUST fail on any case `name` it does not handle, so adding a case here breaks any SDK that has not implemented it.

outcome_categories.transport_error: emit surfaced a transport failure that a retry or durability wrapper may recover (Go: errors.Is(err, ErrTransport); Python: a transport exception type; TS: a rejected Promise / returned Error tagged as transport)
outcome_categories.caller_error: emit surfaced a caller-bug error, distinguishable from transport_error, that a retry cannot fix (invalid event, closed emitter, oversized frame)

cases.name: dial_failure_unreachable_socket
cases.setup: Construct DaemonEmitter (default mode) with a socket path that has no listener.

cases.name: caller_bug_invalid_decision
cases.setup: Construct DaemonEmitter (default mode) with a socket path that has no listener.
cases.action: emit an event whose decision value is invalid
cases.note: Caller-bug errors MUST stay distinguishable from transport_error so callers can choose to retry only transport failures.
